description: The study of conservation of mass number (A) and atomic number (Z) during nuclear reactions.

variable_sub.name: Parent mass number
variable_sub.description: Mass number of the parent nucleus (total protons and neutrons).

variable_sub.name: Daughter mass number
variable_sub.description: Mass number of the daughter nucleus after the reaction.

variable_sub.name: Particle mass number
variable_sub.description: Mass number of the emitted or incoming particle.

variable_sub.name: Parent atomic number
variable_sub.description: Number of protons in the parent nucleus.

variable_sub.name: Daughter atomic number
variable_sub.description: Number of protons in the daughter nucleus.

variable_sub.name: Particle atomic number
variable_sub.description: Number of protons in the emitted or incoming particle.
